global.description: The ad features a modern design with a blue background and bold text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to try the StarVault service for free.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: A blue background featuring abstract shapes, including an oval and a square, creating a modern and playful aesthetic.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The text 'StarVault' in bold, prominent font, positioned at the top of the ad, conveying brand identity.

elements.label: Small decorative circle
elements.description: A small circular shape in the background, adding visual interest without specific branding.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'A new season drops' in large, bold font, centrally positioned to attract attention.
elements.text_content: A new season drops Cancel anytime

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: The text 'Cancel anytime' in smaller font, positioned below the main headline, providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free' in a clear, inviting font, located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, playful and modern, StarVault logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main headline is centered, followed by subheadline text, and the CTA button is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: StarVault, A new season drops, Cancel anytime, Try for free
